subject: [PATCH 4/7 v3] mm/memcontrol: convert memcg to use page_counter_stock

2026-05-25.patch_summary: This patch converts the memcg (memory cgroup) code to use page_counter_stock instead of its own stock handling logic. This change removes special casing for avoiding refilling and flushing of old stock, allows for failure during page_counter_enable_stock() if there is not enough memory to allocate a percpu page_counter_stock, and restructures drain_all_stock to iterate CPUs in the outer loop for better performance.
